detectors.description:
Reentrancy in KIBUCHI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (KIBUCHI.sol#657-781):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (KIBUCHI.sol#721)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (KIBUCHI.sol#795-807)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (KIBUCHI.sol#727)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (KIBUCHI.sol#815)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (KIBUCHI.sol#779)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (KIBUCHI.sol#941)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (KIBUCHI.sol#921)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (KIBUCHI.sol#923)
	KIBUCHI._rOwned (KIBUCHI.sol#327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KIBUCHI._takeTeam(uint256) (KIBUCHI.sol#935-943)
	- KIBUCHI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (KIBUCHI.sol#895-931)
	- KIBUCHI.balanceOf(address) (KIBUCHI.sol#483-487)
	- KIBUCHI.constructor() (KIBUCHI.sol#417-447)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (KIBUCHI.sol#779)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (KIBUCHI.sol#949)
	KIBUCHI._rTotal (KIBUCHI.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KIBUCHI._getCurrentSupply() (KIBUCHI.sol#1091-1101)
	- KIBUCHI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (KIBUCHI.sol#947-953)
	- KIBUCHI.constructor() (KIBUCHI.sol#417-447)
	- KIBUCHI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (KIBUCHI.sol#579-601)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [KIBUCHI._transfer(address,address,uint256)](KIBUCHI.sol#L657-L781):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](KIBUCHI.sol#L721)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](KIBUCHI.sol#L795-L807)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](KIBUCHI.sol#L727)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](KIBUCHI.sol#L815)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](KIBUCHI.sol#L779)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](KIBUCHI.sol#L941)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](KIBUCHI.sol#L921)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](KIBUCHI.sol#L923)
	[KIBUCHI._rOwned](KIBUCHI.sol#L327) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [KIBUCHI._takeTeam(uint256)](KIBUCHI.sol#L935-L943)
	- [KIBUCHI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](KIBUCHI.sol#L895-L931)
	- [KIBUCHI.balanceOf(address)](KIBUCHI.sol#L483-L487)
	- [KIBUCHI.constructor()](KIBUCHI.sol#L417-L447)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](KIBUCHI.sol#L779)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](KIBUCHI.sol#L949)
	[KIBUCHI._rTotal](KIBUCHI.sol#L341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [KIBUCHI._getCurrentSupply()](KIBUCHI.sol#L1091-L1101)
	- [KIBUCHI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](KIBUCHI.sol#L947-L953)
	- [KIBUCHI.constructor()](KIBUCHI.sol#L417-L447)
	- [KIBUCHI.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](KIBUCHI.sol#L579-L601)
